title: Kling 3.0 - AI Director-Level Video Generator | 6-Shot Free Editing | Full Modality Reference Control | Universe-Strongest Consistency
description: Evolved from single-clip tool to complete AI editing system! Kling 3.0 supports 6 freely switchable camera shots, each with independent storyboard frames, reference images, and camera language control. Full modality reference system: text prompts + multi-image references + video subject library + audio instructions - direct every frame like a real director. Universe-strongest character consistency keeps actors identical across multi-shot transitions. 15-second complete narratives, 4K cinematic output, Kuaishou's breakthrough architecture.
